summary: The endpoint-domain-and-schema task is complete in substance. The repository has Prisma/SQLite wiring, migrations, generated client setup, deterministic db:prepare, idempotent endpoint seed defaults, repeatability unit coverage, and docs/generated/db-schema.md matches the implemented Endpoint, EndpointParam, and ResponseCase persistence shape. The implementation stays within the persistence slice and maps to endpoint-tool-management.md without adding UI, MCP, REST, Basic Auth, OAuth, or reset behavior. Required gates are recorded as passing: npm run db:prepare, npm run test:unit, and npm run verify.
satisfied_exit_criteria: npm run db:prepare prepares SQLite runtime state through Prisma migrations, client generation, and seed execution.

db:prepare repeatability is covered by tests/unit/db-prepare.test.ts, which runs the command twice against an isolated SQLite database and verifies singular endpoint, parameter, and response-case seed rows.

The Prisma schema can represent endpoint names, titles/descriptions, enabled state, immutable IDs, delete codes, default responses, ordered parameters, response cases, timestamps, and endpoint/case failure config fields.
docs/generated/db-schema.md accurately documents the implemented Prisma models, indexes, preparation behavior, and seed defaults.
Mandatory deterministic checks passed according to state/deterministic-checks.json: npm run db:prepare, npm run test:unit, and npm run verify.
